content.text: {"component":"tagging","summary":"Tagging presents as a governed, canonical tagging runtime with explicit HTTP contracts, rich configuration, host-minimal runnable surface, and ops assets, reading as a strong pre-RC component with a few release-hygiene gaps.","strengths":["Clear canonical product identity (composer description, docs)","Explicit HTTP contract directory and route/catalog configs","Host-minimal runtime and Docker compose for local runs","QA/tooling hooks present (phpunit/phpstan/phpmd/cs-fixer, Playwright)","Ops artifacts (alerts, Grafana) and CI workflows in place"],"risks":["No git tags detected for release/version traceability","Antora module/navigation pages not detected in repo tree","phpunit/phpstan only .dist configs committed; local tuning unknown","E2E/browser test presence inferred from tooling; test suites not enumerated in facts"],"next_actions":["Create annotated git tags and release notes for the current baseline","Promote .dist configs to tuned project configs (phpunit.xml, phpstan.neon) and run in CI","Ensure CI executes unit/integration/panther and Playwright e2e suites","Check in Antora module pages/navigation and wire the report path for publishing","Document and publish the HTTP contract from contracts/http and docs/http"],"notes":["This refresh is grounded on repository tree, composer/package scripts, and docs present in the repo snapshot.","Deeper scoring changes would require executing tool outputs and enumerating test files, which were not part of the provided facts."],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["composer.json","README.md","contracts/http","config/tag_route_catalog.php","config/tag_public_surface.php","config/tag_security.yaml","config/tag_rbac.yaml",".github/workflows","host-minimal/index.php","host-minimal/bootstrap.php","host-minimal/smoke-health.php","docker-compose.yml","ops/alerts","ops/grafana","docs/http","docs/tag","docs/rbac.md","phpunit.xml.dist","phpstan.neon.dist"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":null,"qa":null,"ops":null,"market":null,"overall":null},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Product identity reads as a canonical tagging component with clear CRUD/assignment/search/suggest scope and internal governance.","risks":["Antora module pages/navigation not detected; public report publishing path may not be in-repo","License is proprietary, which may limit public-facing adoption signals"],"improvements":["Add/verify Antora module pages and nav for consistent publishing","Expand README/docs to link contracts/http and public surfaces for faster discovery"],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md","docs/tag","docs/http","contracts/http"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Architecture shape is coherent with explicit HTTP contracts, route catalogs, and governed configuration driving a host-minimal runtime.","risks":["PSR-4 autoload points to src/; verify repository structure alignment and core boundary locations","Contract-to-runtime drift risk without automated checks surfaced in facts"],"improvements":["Confirm autoload path alignment and document core vs adapter boundaries","Add/verify contract drift checks in CI referencing contracts/http and route catalogs"],"evidence":["composer.json","contracts/http","config/tag_route_catalog.php","config/tag_public_surface.php","host-minimal/bootstrap.php"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Runnable surface is evident via host-minimal bootstrap/index, docker-compose, and dedicated runtime/config files.","risks":["Runtime smoke and health checks exist but their CI execution is not evidenced","No git tags reduce clarity on deployable version references"],"improvements":["Add CI job to run runtime smoke/health scripts on each push","Tag releases to anchor deployable runtime versions"],"evidence":["host-minimal/index.php","host-minimal/smoke-health.php","docker-compose.yml","config/tag_runtime.php"]},"qa":{"summary":"QA/tooling posture is strong in configuration and scripts (phpunit/phpstan/phpmd/cs-fixer, Panther, Playwright), with .dist baselines present.","risks":["phpunit.xml and phpstan.neon are only present as .dist; tuned project configs and coverage depth are unknown","Actual test files/suites are not enumerated in provided facts"],"improvements":["Promote/tune phpunit.xml and phpstan.neon and publish coverage in CI","Ensure CI runs unit/integration/panther and npm e2e jobs with artifacts"],"evidence":["phpunit.xml.dist","phpstan.neon.dist","composer.json","package.json",".github/workflows"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational readiness is strong with Docker, CI workflows, security/RBAC configs, and observability assets (alerts, Grafana).","risks":["No git tags found, hindering release traceability and rollback clarity","Operational runbooks are implied by docs but not explicitly linked from README"],"improvements":["Introduce annotated git tagging and release notes per deployment","Link ops/alerts and ops/grafana setup/runbooks from README/docs/ops"],"evidence":["docker-compose.yml",".github/workflows","config/tag_security.yaml","config/tag_rbac.yaml","ops/alerts","ops/grafana","docs/ops"]},"market":{"summary":"Market-facing alignment is supported by substantial docs and a clear internal product story, but licensing and publishing gaps temper external posture.","risks":["Proprietary license limits external adoption signals","Antora publishing path not detected reduces discoverability"],"improvements":["Clarify intended distribution posture in README (internal vs external)","Ensure report/docs are published via Antora or equivalent site pipeline"],"evidence":["README.md","docs/release","docs/rc5","docs/security","composer.json"]},"overall":{"summary":"Overall, the component presents a mature pre-RC profile with strong governance, runtime, and ops signals; main gaps are release tagging and doc publishing hygiene.","risks":["Absence of git tags for versioning undermines RC/release framing","Documentation site scaffolding not detected may delay report publishing"],"improvements":["Establish release tagging and notes to mark RCs","Wire Antora (or equivalent) docs publishing and link from README"],"evidence":["git_exact_tag (no names found)",".github/workflows","docs","README.md"]}}}
